prose: The HOMO–LUMO gap of furan was calculated as 6.2573602 eV using DFT at the level of B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard') with density fitting enabled. The calculation was performed in the gas phase (no solvent). The geometry was provided in file /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz and not re-optimized at DFT. The SCF procedure converged within 9 cycles. HOMO = −6.36 eV, LUMO = −0.10 eV. The method employed was PySCF with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set.
